'''sangojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okoume|okoume]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okoume|okoume]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sangojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || sængejeth || sængejej || sængejesh || sængeje
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || sangongojoth || sangongojoj || sangongojosh || sangongojo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || sangojoth || sangojoj || sangojosh || sangojo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || sangofjofth || sangofjofj || sangofjofsh || sangofjof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sangojotho || sangojojo || sangojosho || sangojoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || sangojoth || sangojoj || sangojosh || sangojo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sangojothol || sangojojol || sangojoshol || sangojokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sangojoothotho || sangojoojojo || sangojooshosho || sangojooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || sangojothon || sangojojon || sangojoshon || sangojokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sangojothooro || sangojojooro || sangojoshooro || sangojokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
